intro: Megalastrum eugenii is a plant species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae, commonly known as the adder's tongue ferns. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Megalastrum eugenii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
